articles.title: BU rally pushes back on Pride flag removals, calls for policy change
articles.description:
Organizers handed a letter to university officials, asking for a revision of the signage policy.

The post BU rally pushes back on Pride flag removals, calls for policy change appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: BU students rallied on April 3, 2026, against the removal of Pride flags.
Organizers delivered a letter requesting changes to the university's signage policy.
The rally aims to promote inclusivity and support for LGBTQ+ students at BU.

articles.title: She knit an MBTA-themed sweater inspired by her commutes. The internet is loving it.
articles.description:
“I’m very inspired by Boston and New England — I feel like it has a very charming, magical spirit about it.”

The post She knit an MBTA-themed sweater inspired by her commutes. The internet is loving it. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Local artist creates MBTA-themed sweater reflecting Boston's charm and spirit.
Sweater inspired by daily commutes, showcasing Boston's unique transit culture.
Inspires community engagement and pride in local transit among Boston residents.
